message:
test: add expected summaries, manifest entries, and fixture tests for 6 providers

Completes the fixture corpus for ChatGPT, ClawdBot, Vibe, Factory,
OpenClaw, and PiAgent with expected canonical summaries, manifest
entries, and integration test functions. Also adds Amp fixture file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "fixture_id": "chatgpt_simple",
+  "provider_slug": "chatgpt",
+  "session_id": "chatgpt-conv-001",
+  "workspace": null,
+  "title": "Understanding Rust lifetimes",
+  "message_count": 4,
+  "roles": ["User", "Assistant", "User", "Assistant"],
+  "started_at_present": true,
+  "ended_at_present": true,
+  "model_name": null,
+  "has_tool_calls": false,
+  "has_tool_results": false,
+  "known_lossy_fields": ["workspace"],
+  "notes": "ChatGPT mapping-format JSON with parent chain traversal. Float timestamps. Model from metadata.model_slug."
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "fixture_id": "clawdbot_simple",
+  "provider_slug": "clawdbot",
+  "session_id": "clawdbot_simple",
+  "workspace": null,
+  "title": "Can you help me understand how async works in Rust?",

+  "roles": ["User", "Assistant", "User", "Assistant"],

+  "has_tool_results": false,
+  "known_lossy_fields": ["workspace"],
+  "notes": "Basic 4-message ClawdBot JSONL conversation with RFC3339 timestamps. No workspace or model fields in format."
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "fixture_id": "factory_simple",
+  "provider_slug": "factory",
+  "session_id": "factory-sess-001",
+  "workspace": "/home/user/webapp",
+  "title": "Refactor authentication module",
+  "message_count": 4,
+  "roles": ["User", "Assistant", "User", "Assistant"],
+  "started_at_present": true,
+  "ended_at_present": true,

+  "has_tool_calls": false,
+  "has_tool_results": false,
+  "known_lossy_fields": [],
+  "notes": "Factory JSONL with session_start header, 4 message entries. Workspace from cwd in header. Model from message entries."
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "fixture_id": "openclaw_simple",
+  "provider_slug": "openclaw",
+  "session_id": "openclaw_simple",
+  "workspace": "/home/user/project",
+  "title": "Add error handling to the database connection pool",
+  "message_count": 4,
+  "roles": ["User", "Assistant", "User", "Assistant"],
+  "started_at_present": true,
+  "ended_at_present": true,
+  "model_name": "claude-opus-4-5",
+  "has_tool_calls": true,
+  "has_tool_results": false,
+  "known_lossy_fields": [],
+  "notes": "OpenClaw JSONL with session header and sequential message IDs. Has toolCall content blocks in assistant messages."
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "fixture_id": "piagent_simple",
+  "provider_slug": "pi-agent",
+  "session_id": "pi-sess-001",
+  "workspace": "/home/user/project",
+  "title": "Write unit tests for the parser module",
+  "message_count": 4,
+  "roles": ["User", "Assistant", "Tool", "Assistant"],
+  "started_at_present": true,
+  "ended_at_present": true,
+  "model_name": "claude-3-opus",
+  "has_tool_calls": true,
+  "has_tool_results": false,
+  "known_lossy_fields": [],
+  "notes": "Pi-Agent JSONL with session header, toolResult role, and toolCall content blocks. Filename contains underscore as required."
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "fixture_id": "vibe_simple",

+}
